[axiom](../../README.md) / [feedback](../README.md) / createFeedbackClient

# Function: createFeedbackClient()

> **createFeedbackClient**(`config`, `settings?`): [`FeedbackClient`](../type-aliases/FeedbackClient.md)

Creates a feedback client for sending user feedback to Axiom.

## Parameters

### config

[`FeedbackConfig`](../type-aliases/FeedbackConfig.md)

### settings?

[`FeedbackSettings`](../type-aliases/FeedbackSettings.md)

## Returns

[`FeedbackClient`](../type-aliases/FeedbackClient.md)

## Example

```ts
const client = createFeedbackClient({ token: 'xaat-...', dataset: 'feedback' });
void client.sendFeedback(
  { traceId: '...', capability: 'support-agent' },
  Feedback.thumbUp({ name: 'response-quality' })
);
```
